workflow.name: B2B Invoice Dispute Resolution Pipeline
workflow.description: Automates the end-to-end dispute resolution process for B2B invoice discrepancies — from intake to GL adjustment and stakeholder notification.
workflow.output: Dispute Resolved — GL Updated & Stakeholders Notified

agents.name: Dispute Intake Agent
agents.role: Parses and classifies incoming dispute requests from email and customer portal

agents.name: Invoice Validation Engine
agents.role: Cross-references disputed invoice against PO and contract terms in the ERP

agents.name: Resolution Decision Agent
agents.role: Applies business rules to determine resolution path — credit note, partial payment, or escalation

agents.name: Stakeholder Notifier
agents.role: Sends resolution outcome to the client and internal finance team with full audit trail
